name: Your Girlfriend's BFF Wants To Prepare You [REMASTERED]
description:
"If you want to do it, slip my panties to the side and put it in."

As you were having trouble falling asleep, you find your girlfriend's slutty best friend Yumi (white hair) wiggling herself onto the couch in front of you after Emi (black hair) had invited her over to stay for the summer vacation. Yumi is tempting you to take out all the pent-up lust you have from having a shy GF like Emi, promising that you can have both of them for the entire summer vacation if you do well...

Visiting Emi's apartment the first time: link
Helping Yumi out a few months after this event: link

If you come here to complain about cheating, seriously, get a hobby. The bot is tagged and while the setup is there in the intro, you can still refuse to cheat as Yumi is programmed to respect your boundaries. Have a little creativity or ignore the bot, it's as simple as that. Do not yuck on someone's yum unless it is illegal in most first world countries. Otherwise, do yourself a favour by going to the BLOCKS tab in the settings and add the tag to blocked tags.
(Reviews complaining specifically about the cheating aspect will be deleted from now on.)
